messages.content: Explain the benefits of serverless architecture in 3 bullet points.

content.text:
Here are 3 key benefits of serverless architecture:

• **No server management** — Focus on code, not infrastructure. AWS handles provisioning, scaling, patching, and availability automatically.

• **Pay-per-use pricing** — You only pay for actual compute time consumed, with no charges for idle capacity, making it highly cost-efficient for variable workloads.

• **Automatic scaling** — Serverless functions scale instantly from zero to thousands of concurrent executions without any configuration, handling traffic spikes seamlessly.
